_comment: Mushi Mushi Claude Code hooks — drop into your project root as .claude/hooks.json

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[mushi] Pre-commit: checking active Mushi reports for this repo..." >&2; mushi reports list --status new --severity critical --json 2>/dev/null | head -3 || true'
bash -c 'echo "[mushi] File changed — run mushi fix <reportId> to dispatch agentic fix" >&2; true'

_setup: Run `mushi setup --ide claude --with-rules` to write this file + .claude/rules/mushi.md automatically
